steps.name: Create Service Ticket
steps.description: A service ticket is created in the CRM system, either manually by an agent or through an external channel (e.g., website form).

steps.name: Assign Ticket
steps.description: The service ticket is assigned to a service agent, either manually or automatically based on rules.
actions: Update the 'assigned_to' field on the service ticket.

steps.name: Track SLA
steps.description: The system tracks the service level agreement (SLA) for the ticket.
actions: Start a timer based on the ticket's priority and SLA policy.

steps.name: Resolve Ticket
steps.description: The service agent resolves the customer's issue and updates the ticket status.

steps.name: Send Resolution Notification
steps.description: The system sends a notification to the customer that their issue has been resolved.
actions: Send an email or SMS to the customer.

steps.name: Handle Escalation
steps.description: If the SLA is breached, the ticket is escalated to a higher-level support tier.
actions: Re-assign the ticket to the escalation team and update its priority.
